scripts.build: python3 -m ensurepip --upgrade 2>/dev/null; python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || (curl -sS https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py | python3 && python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt)
scripts.start: python3 -m streamlit run app.py --server.port ${PORT:-8501} --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.headless true || python -m streamlit run app.py --server.port ${PORT:-8501} --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.headless true
